description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a wood-textured exterior, featuring a simple and modern design. The cabinet has a smooth, flat top and vertical sides, with a subtle seam indicating the separation between the main body and the drawer. On one side, a small, horizontal handle is visible, suggesting a single pull-out drawer. The wood grain pattern is consistent across all surfaces, giving it a natural and warm appearance. The cabinet appears sturdy and functional, suitable for storing documents or small items in an organized manner. Its minimalist design makes it appropriate for both professional and casual urban environments.
description: A small, wood-textured filing cabinet with a single drawer and a minimalist, modern design. Features a subtle handle and a seamless, rectangular form.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat, wood-textured face with a faint horizontal seam dividing the drawer from the main body.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's narrow profile and the top's slight curvature, with no visible handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front but without a handle or seam, displaying the continuous wood grain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the small, horizontal handle for the drawer, set against the wood-textured surface.
